system: Brian & Co Live Legal Command Center
purpose: Real internal portal for legal records, IP records, approval queue, action history, founder review, and legal review tracking.
important: This portal tracks and manages legal workflow. Actual filings, attorney review, signed contracts, trademark registration, copyright registration, and legal enforceability still require real legal action outside the app.
tone: trusted friend, knowledgeable, dependable, respectful of boundaries, warm, human, refined, never gimmicky, never valued customer
